items.headline: Eos Energy Enterprises Establishes Strategic Entry into Germany Through Exclusive Long-Duration Storage Partnership
items.summary: Binding Master Supply Agreement with German developer CAPAC Energy — exclusive across Germany, Austria & Switzerland (DACH) through 2031. 750 MWh initial commitment with a pathway to 2 GWh; Eos' first international commercial framework for Indensity. CAPAC's first German projects target commercial operation in late 2026; purchase orders will flow into reported backlog.
